title: 8 Things That Look Like Godly Humility But Are Actually Pride in a Costume
caption:
8 things that look like godly humility but are actually pride in a costume.

Saying "I'm nothing special" so someone corrects you. Refusing every compliment on reflex. Staying quiet so people call you humble. None of that is humility. It's strategy, and pride is good at learning new disguises.

Meekness is strength under control (Matthew 5:5). Insecurity is just fear wearing a spiritual label. Real humility doesn't need witnesses, and it doesn't need to be asked twice before it takes the lead.

Save this and check which one of these is actually you.

#faith #humility #christianmen #manofgod #pride #realtalk #character
